stemHtml: Which of the following statements regarding loads and stresses is correct?

options.a: Possible loads on an object are bending and torsion.
options.b: Stress is the ratio of the original length to the new length after the action of a force.
options.c: Only the material of a component decides whether a deformation is elastic or plastic.
options.d: Strain is a measure of deformation of the fuselage.
